note: Stub citation — bytes not yet mirrored. /c/<cid> redirects readers to the upstream URL until the mirror script runs (Week 2+). The hash is computed over the `canonical` sub-object and verifies via lib/cid.ts.

canonical.name: WHO Model List of Essential Medicines (22nd List, 2021)

probes.note: Body hash is a snapshot at probedAt. For dynamic pages (e.g. search results) the hash will differ on later fetches — that is information, not error. Original body bytes are NOT stored (copyright-safe).
